purpose: Expose safe public raw URLs for the guarded import-data workflow using already registered materialized observational assets where available. Governance registries are explicitly marked as governance-only, not observational data.
correction_note: The previous default pointed to RLL_ALL_REAL_DATA_MASTER.csv, which is a governance registry, not an observational dataset. The default is now a materialized H(z) CSV.
claim_boundary: These URLs route public CSV/JSON artifacts into an audit workspace. They do not validate RLL, dark matter, dark energy, cosmology claims, or model superiority. Scientific promotion still requires provenance, checksum, schema validation, covariance/error policy, baseline comparison and metric output.

url_policy.artifact_behavior: download to _audit/raw/data.json and upload as a temporary GitHub Actions artifact without committing raw data

rows.claim_allowed: Audit materialized H(z) rows with source labels and uncertainties.
rows.claim_blocked: Do not claim a full expansion-history fit without covariance/error policy and baseline comparison.

rows.claim_allowed: Audit DESI DR2 BAO primary-point routing and provenance fields.
rows.claim_blocked: Do not promote to model validation without covariance ordering, likelihood semantics and identical baseline comparison.

rows.claim_allowed: Audit the compressed Planck 2018 distance-prior block and covariance metadata.
rows.claim_blocked: Do not replace the full Planck likelihood/chains or claim CMB validation from this block alone.

rows.claim_allowed: Audit materialized fσ8 growth rows with survey/method/reference labels.
rows.claim_blocked: Do not claim growth validation without covariance/independence policy and baseline comparison.

rows.claim_allowed: Audit the master registry of real-data routes and TOKEN_VAZIO gaps.
rows.claim_blocked: Do not treat this registry as observational data or validation evidence.
